farmer.name: Farmer's License
farmer.description: Unlocks the ability to trade duplicate mobs for emeralds.

cleric.name: Cleric's Ordination
cleric.description: Unlocks the ability to convert duplicate mobs into magical roll tokens.

toolsmith.name: Toolsmith's Apprenticeship
toolsmith.description: Unlocks 1 free reroll per day to correct your luck.

librarian.name: Librarian's Membership
librarian.description: Unlocks 1 focused roll per day (guarantees no common mobs).

uncommon_token.name: Uncommon Roll Token
uncommon_token.description: A single-use token that guarantees an Uncommon mob on your next roll.

rare_token.name: Rare Roll Token
rare_token.description: A single-use token that guarantees a Rare mob on your next roll.

epic_token.name: Epic Roll Token
epic_token.description: A single-use token that guarantees an Epic mob on your next roll.
